title: Non-record: 1xH100 warmdown100 30m scaling run
body:
## Summary
This PR adds one non-record unlimited-compute folder with a 30-minute 1xH100 run using the baseline script and WARMDOWN_ITERS=100.

## Why this matters
- Low-cost 1x evidence while waiting for larger 8x grants
- Same-session controlled comparison against a 10-minute baseline

## Key result
- 30m run: val_bpb=1.27705124
- Same-session 10m control: val_bpb=1.34638424
- Improvement: 0.06933300

## Included files
- README.md
- submission.json
- train.log
- train_gpt.py

This PR only adds one folder under records/track_non_record_16mb/.
